1.description: Very cheap and fast model for simple extraction, classification, tiny summaries, and obvious rewrites.

2.description: Low-cost general assistant for routine writing, translation, and short customer support tasks.

3.description: Balanced model for multi-step instructions, medium context, and moderate reasoning.

4.description: Strong model for coding, math, complex analysis, and high precision tasks.

5.description: Best available model for high-stakes, ambiguous, very long, or failure-sensitive prompts.
